name: Heath Bar Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the first five ingredients (and set aside 1 cup of mixture).
2. Dissolve the buttermilk with the baking soda.
3. Beat in the egg and combine with the rest of the mix, buttermilk, and egg.
4. Pour into a greased 9 x 13 pan or two greased 8-inch floured cake pans.
5. Chop 3 Heath bars (or more as desired) and add nuts to the set mixture.
6. Sprinkle over the top of the mixture and bake at 350°F for 30-40 minutes.
